title: Vegetation Patch Feature
description: Scatters a vegetation feature in an area with configurable radius and depth.

vegetation_patch_feature_definition.title: Vegetation Patch Feature Definition
vegetation_patch_feature_definition.description: A single Vegetation Patch Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

replaceable_blocks.description: Blocks that can be replaced to create the vegetation patch.

ground_block.description: The block to place as the ground base of the patch.

vegetation_feature.description: Reference to the vegetation feature to scatter.

surface.description: Whether vegetation grows on the floor or ceiling.

depth.description: How deep the patch goes below/above the surface.

vegetation_chance.description: Chance for vegetation to spawn at each valid location.

horizontal_radius.description: Horizontal radius range of the patch.

extra_deep_block_chance.description: Optional. Chance of extra deep ground blocks.

extra_edge_column_chance.description: Optional. Chance of extra edge column ground blocks.

waterlogged.description: Optional. Whether the patch can be waterlogged.
